expectations.evidence: Line 44: Uses 'Konto 4900 Sonstige betriebliche Aufwendungen' instead of 4950. While not incorrect per se, 4950 (Rechts- und Beratungskosten) is the more specific and preferred account for consulting services.

Lines 55-58: Uses 1574/1774 (innergemeinschaftlicher Erwerb) instead of 1577 (§13b UStG Leistungen). For B2B services (not goods), §13b UStG applies — the correct accounts are 1577/1787, not the igE accounts 1574/1774.
Line 103: 'REVERSE CHARGE BEHANDLUNG (PARAGRAPH 13b UStG)' — correctly identified
Lines 24-25: Both items listed and assigned
